steps.title: Incubate the cells at 37 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the cells at 37 °C for 30 minutes, protected from light.

steps.title: Remove the staining medium
steps.instruction: Remove the staining medium. Replace with fresh, pre-warmed medium.

steps.title: Image the cells immediately using an...
steps.instruction: Image the cells immediately using an epifluorescence or confocal microscope with a FITC/GFP-like channel (excitation ~485 nm, emission ~520 nm).

steps.title: Capture images of the cells to assess ROS levels
steps.instruction: Capture images of the cells to assess ROS levels.

steps.title: Warm complete culture medium to 37 °C
steps.instruction: Warm complete culture medium to 37 °C. Dilute CellROX Green reagent directly into the culture medium , resulting in a final concentration of 1µM. Note: for microglia we change half medium only, so the conentration of the solution will be 2µM, to have 1µM as final concentration on cells
